name: OrganiMax Nutrient Corp.
summary: OrganiMax Nutrient Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada, Mexico, and internationally. It explores for lithium, potassium, and boron deposits. The company holds 100% interests in the Zacatecas-San Luis Potosi project located in central Mexico; and the Coahuila Salar project located in northern Mexico. Its properties cover approximately 424,000 hectares. The company was formerly known as Alset Minerals Corp. and changed its name to OrganiMax Nutrient Corp. in August 2018. OrganiMax Nutrient Corp. was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
